title: Can a Specific Status Change Tigger a Zap in Zapier
excerpt:
Is there a way to trigger a zap via status change in Monday? 
The only option there is available in Zapier is “Specific Column Value Changed in Board” that triggers any status change not a specific status.

posts.author: Yidi (Yidi Breuer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to trigger a zap via status change in Monday?
The only option there is available in Zapier is “Specific Column Value Changed in Board” that triggers any status change not a specific status.

posts.author: neill (Neill Shurville)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can do this via Filters in Zapier.

So there would be a Filter after the Trigger, like this:

image933×480 23.4 KB

And then in the filter, you would set it up something like this:

image949×550 27.1 KB

What this is saying is IF a specific column changes (e.g. a status column) AND the value of this column now matches [insert your criteria here], then run the Zap.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
